# scalegrid_backup (Resource)

Triggers and manages an on-demand backup of a ScaleGrid cluster.

## Example Usage

```terraform
# Trigger an on-demand backup of a cluster.
resource "scalegrid_backup" "snapshot" {
  database   = "mongodb"
  cluster_id = scalegrid_cluster.mongo.id
  name       = "pre-migration-snapshot"
  comment    = "Taken before the v2 migration"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `cluster_id` (String) ID of the cluster to back up.
- `database` (String) Database engine: `mongodb`, `redis`, `mysql`, or `postgresql`.
- `name` (String) Unique name for the backup.

### Optional

- `comment` (String) Optional comment describing the backup.
- `target` (String) For replica sets, which node to back up: `PRIMARY`/`SECONDARY` (MongoDB), `MASTER`/`SLAVE` (Redis/MySQL), or `MASTER`/`STANDBY` (PostgreSQL). PostgreSQL requires a target and defaults to `MASTER`.

### Read-Only

- `created` (String) Creation time as a Unix timestamp (seconds, UTC).
- `id` (String) Unique identifier of the backup.
- `type` (String) Backup type (`ONDEMAND` or `SCHEDULED`).
